login.rodoPre: By logging in, you accept and confirm that you have read the

verification.title: Email address verification
verification.sent: An activation link has been sent to both email addresses (old and new).
verification.confirm: Confirm the new email on both addresses to apply the change.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Your email address has not been confirmed yet. Check your inbox.
errors.tooManyLoginAttempts: Too many failed login attempts. Try again in a moment.
errors.serverError: A server error occurred. Try again later.
errors.unexpectedLoginError: An unexpected error occurred during login.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.invalidEmail: The provided email address is invalid.
errors.emailTaken: This email address is already taken.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.sameUsername: The new username is the same as the old one.
errors.updateFailed: An error occurred while updating data.
errors.sameEmail: The new email is the same as the old one.
errors.emailUpdateFailed: An error occurred while changing the email.
errors.passwordTooShort: The password is too short (minimum 6 characters).
errors.passwordSameAsOld: The new password must be different from the old password.
errors.resetLinkExpired: The reset link has expired or is invalid. Request a password change again.
errors.rateLimitWait: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.
errors.resetPasswordError: An error occurred while trying to reset the password.

validation.emailMaxLength: Maximum length of an email address is 254 characters

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address below, and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: The password reset link has been sent to your email address.
